hero.body: Software / Data Engineer in Paris building Python backends, APIs, data pipelines, and B2B SaaS tools that turn complex and operational data into decisions: optimization, pricing, capacity, reporting, internal UX, and automation.
hero.portrait_alt: Portrait of Liam Abourousse in a white shirt against a light wall

philosophy.body: How can a junior engineer, augmented by generative AI but bounded by human validation, take a maritime data product - the Voyage Report - from a demonstrable prototype to a production-operated service without degrading quality or security?

projects.title: Voyage Report
projects.subtitle: MARITIME DATA PRODUCT FROM DEMO TO OPERATED SERVICE
projects.desc: Productionized a weather-routing report into a server-generated PDF service with a configuration wizard, recurring sends, admin monitoring, and access-control hardening.

projects.title: Voyage Insights
projects.subtitle: FILE INGESTION, KPIS, DASHBOARDS, ANALYTICAL EXPORTS
projects.desc: Built product workflows around voyage files: column mapping, business enrichment, KPI computation, dashboards, analytical exports, and automated reporting for non-technical users.

projects.title: Maritime Analysis
projects.subtitle: APIS, WEATHER-OCEAN ENRICHMENT, OPERATIONAL REPORTING
projects.desc: Combined multi-source AIS, navigation history, metocean data, and vessel-performance signals into simple indicators for performance, delay, route consistency, and forecast quality.

projects.title: KP:AI
projects.subtitle: KPMG FRANCE INTELLIGENCIA HACKATHON WINNING PROJECT
projects.desc: Won against more than 100 teams and 350 engineering students with a decision-support digital twin for supply-chain scenarios: cost, lead-time, carbon, and executive reporting.

experience.subtitle: Maritime DeepTech · Ecole Polytechnique · Alternance finale
experience.desc: Final-year work-study role across Python backend, data engineering, SaaS product delivery, and applied AI. Built REST APIs, production data workflows, internal tooling, scheduled tasks, dashboards, exports, and reporting flows for operational teams and enterprise clients.

experience.subtitle: Data Engineering · AI · Distributed Systems · Cloud
experience.desc: Five-year engineering program with specialization in data engineering, artificial intelligence, distributed systems, and cloud infrastructure. French native, English C1, TOEIC 985/990.

buckets.title: BACKEND
buckets.list: Python, FastAPI, Flask, REST APIs, SQL, modular architecture, tests, documentation

buckets.title: DATA PRODUCTS
buckets.list: ETL, data quality, validation, feature engineering, KPIs, dashboards, reporting, spatiotemporal data

buckets.title: STORAGE & OPS
buckets.list: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle SQL, Supabase, NoSQL, Elasticsearch, Redis, Docker, CI/CD, Grafana

buckets.title: FRONT & AI
buckets.list: TypeScript, JavaScript, Next.js, Vue, Angular, admin UX, LLMs, RAG, embeddings, evaluation

skills.marquee: PYTHON / FASTAPI / SQL / SUPABASE / NEXT.JS / ETL / AIS / PDF REPORTING / RAG /
